title: Column projection on struct does not work with view
description:
### What happens?

Column projection on struct columns works ok when reading parquet file directly but does not work when using a view.

### To Reproduce


**With view:**
```sql
copy (select { f1: 1::int, f2: 1::int } as c1) to 'test.parquet';

create or replace view test as
select *
from 'test.parquet';

explain analyse 
select c1.f1
from test;
```

**Profile:**
```
┌───────────────────────────┐
│           QUERY           │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│      EXPLAIN_ANALYZE      │
│    ────────────────────   │
│           0 Rows          │
│          (0.00s)          │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│         PROJECTION        │
│    ────────────────────   │
│  struct_extract(c1, 'f1') │
│                           │
│           1 Rows          │
│          (0.00s)          │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│         TABLE_SCAN        │
│    ────────────────────   │
│         Function:         │
│        PARQUET_SCAN       │
│                           │
│      Projections: c1      │
│    Total Files Read: 1    │
│                           │
│           1 Rows          │
│          (0.00s)          │
└───────────────────────────┘
```

**Without view:**
```sql
explain analyze 
select c1.f1 
from 'test.parquet';
```

**Profile:**
```
┌───────────────────────────┐
│           QUERY           │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│      EXPLAIN_ANALYZE      │
│    ────────────────────   │
│           0 Rows          │
│          (0.00s)          │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│         PROJECTION        │
│    ────────────────────   │
│  struct_extract(c1, 'f1') │
│                           │
│           1 Rows          │
│          (0.00s)          │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│         TABLE_SCAN        │
│    ────────────────────   │
│         Function:         │
│        PARQUET_SCAN       │
│                           │
│     Projections: c1.f1    │
│    Total Files Read: 1    │
│                           │
│           1 Rows          │
│          (0.00s)          │
└───────────────────────────┘
```

### OS:

iOS, M3

### DuckDB Version:

1.3.1

### DuckDB Client:

cli

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Erik Jansen

### Affiliation:

I have tested with a stable release

Yes

- [x] Yes, I have

bug_features_seed: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW test_view AS SELECT * FROM test_struct;
SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c1, '$.f1')) AS f1 FROM test_view;
SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c1, '$.f2')) AS f2 FROM test_struct WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c1, '$.f1')) IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Column projection on struct fails with view
